name: reactotron-mcp
description: Debug React and React Native apps with Reactotron — Copilot Chat tools and @reactotron participant for logs, state, network, benchmarks, and more.

reactotron.proxyPort.description: Port the Reactotron proxy listens on (apps connect here).

reactotron.reactotronPort.description: Port the Reactotron desktop app runs on.

reactotron.timeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds for state query requests.

reactotron.autoStart.description: Automatically start the proxy when the extension activates.

chatParticipants.name: reactotron
chatParticipants.description: Debug React and React Native apps with Reactotron

commands.name: debug
commands.description: Get a comprehensive debug snapshot of the connected app

commands.name: trace
commands.description: Trace a Redux/MST action through state changes and side effects

commands.name: performance
commands.description: Analyse performance benchmarks and identify slow operations

commands.name: errors
commands.description: Triage all errors — error logs, failed requests, error state

disambiguation.description: Debugging React/React Native apps with Reactotron

languageModelTools.name: reactotron-mcp_getLogs
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Retrieve log messages captured from the connected React/React Native app via Reactotron.

search.description: Substring search in log message text

languageModelTools.name: reactotron-mcp_getTimeline
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Retrieve the full timeline of recent Reactotron messages across all types (logs, network, state actions, custom commands, etc.).

types.description: Filter by message type(s), e.g. ["log", "api.response"]. Omit for all types.

languageModelTools.name: reactotron-mcp_getNetwork
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Retrieve captured API/network requests and responses from the app.

method.description: Filter by HTTP method (GET, POST, etc.)

minDuration.description: Only return requests slower than this many milliseconds

languageModelTools.name: reactotron-mcp_getStateActions
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Retrieve completed Redux or MobX-State-Tree actions captured from the connected app via Reactotron.

actionType.description: Filter by action type substring, e.g. "USER"

languageModelTools.name: reactotron-mcp_getStateChanges
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Retrieve state mutation events captured from the connected app via Reactotron.

path.description: Filter by state path substring, e.g. "user"

languageModelTools.name: reactotron-mcp_getBenchmarks
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Retrieve performance benchmark reports captured from the connected app via Reactotron.

languageModelTools.name: reactotron-mcp_getDisplays
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Retrieve custom display messages sent via reactotron.display(). Structured debug entries with a name, optional preview, and arbitrary value.

search.description: Substring search across display name and preview

languageModelTools.name: reactotron-mcp_getImages
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Retrieve images logged via reactotron.image(). Returns each image rendered inline alongside its metadata.

languageModelTools.name: reactotron-mcp_getErrors
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get a consolidated view of all errors: error-level logs and failed network requests (4xx/5xx). Useful for a quick 'what's broken' overview.

languageModelTools.name: reactotron-mcp_getAppInfo
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Retrieve metadata about the connected app — app name, version, platform, and React/React Native versions.

languageModelTools.name: reactotron-mcp_getConnectionStatus
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Check whether a React/React Native app is currently connected to the Reactotron proxy, including app metadata.

languageModelTools.name: reactotron-mcp_listCustomCommands
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List all custom commands currently registered by the connected app in Reactotron.

languageModelTools.name: reactotron-mcp_getState
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Query the app's state tree (Redux, MobX-State-Tree, etc.) via Reactotron. Use 'keys' to browse available paths, 'values' to read actual data.

path.description: Dot-separated state path to query, e.g. "user.profile" or "" for root

query.description: 'keys' returns child key names at the path; 'values' returns the actual value (default: 'values')

languageModelTools.name: reactotron-mcp_dispatchAction
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Dispatch a Redux or MobX-State-Tree action to the app via Reactotron.

languageModelTools.name: reactotron-mcp_runCustomCommand
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Trigger a custom command registered by the app in Reactotron. Call with no 'command' argument to list all available commands.

args.description: Arguments to pass to the command

languageModelTools.name: reactotron-mcp_clearMessages
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Clear captured Reactotron messages from the in-memory buffer. Clears all buffers by default, or a specific message type.

type.description: Message type to clear. Omit to clear all buffers.
